## Objective
A clear and concise description of what you want to achieve with this feature.

## Motivation
Explain the rationale behind this request. Why is this feature important? What problem does it solve or what value does it add to the professional environment?

## Acceptance Criteria
List the requirements that must be met for this feature to be considered complete:
* [ ] Requirement 1
* [ ] Requirement 2
* [ ] Requirement 3

## Additional Context
Add any other context, mockups, or technical suggestions about the feature request here.
